UI_JB_MoveCorpses_Out_The_Window: Throw All Corpses Out A Window
UI_JB_MoveCorpses_Tooltip_Outside: Choose a spot to put your corpses then select the corpses you would like to collect and move them to that spot
UI_JB_MoveCorpses_Tooltip_Indoors: Choose a spot to put your corpses then move all corpses in the building and basement to that spot
UI_JB_MoveCorpses_Tooltip_Out_The_Window: Automatically throw all corpses out of the closest window
UI_JB_MoveCorpses_Tooltip_New_Version: Search for 3415416226 on the Steam workshop
UI_JB_MoveCorpses_Tooltip_Bury_Mass_Grav: Bury up to 15 corpses in a grave. Must have a shovel
UI_JB_MoveCorpses_Tooltip_Change_Highlig: Changes the color of the selection area highlight
UI_JB_MoveCorpses_Tooltip_Toggle_Safety_: Safety is currently OFF. Toggle Safety On to stop auto moving corpses when zombies are near
Safety is currently ON. Toggle Safety Off to ignore any zombies that may be near
UI_JB_MoveCorpses_New_Version_Modal: Open the Project Zomboid Steam Workshop and search for 3415416226 to get the newest version of this mod
UI_trait_moredesc_HPtoallconstructionsex: %1 HP to all constructions except walls
UI_trait_moredesc_motionsickness: (Increases faster the faster the vehicle goes, up to %1% sickness maximum)
UI_trait_moredesc_motionsickness_forward: Motion sickness occurs when moving both forward and backward, with exponential increase based on speed
UI_trait_moredesc_motionsickness_skidstu: Effects are doubled during skids or sharp turns
UI_trait_moredesc_motionsickness_alloccu: Motion sickness affects all vehicle occupants, progressing 50% slower for the driver
UI_trait_moredesc_panicexceptnightterror: %1% panic, except for night terrors and phobias
UI_trait_moredesc_stressfromlootingcorps: %1% stress and unhappiness from stripping items from corpses
UI_trait_moredesc_nostressfromlootingzom: No stress or unhappiness from stripping items from corpses
UI_trait_moredesc_chancetotripvaultingfe: %1% chance to trip when run/sprint vaulting a low fence or getting attacked by lunging zombies
UI_trait_moredesc_increasedchanceoffallw: Slightly increased chance of falling when bumping into a zombie or survivor
UI_trait_moredesc_decreasedchanceoffallw: Decreased chance of falling when bumping into a zombie or survivor
UI_trait_moredesc_increasedchanceofinjur: Increased chance of injury when opening a can without can opener
UI_trait_moredesc_decreasedchanceofinjur: Decreased chance of injury when opening a can without can opener
UI_trait_moredesc_weaponsightsrangebonus: Weapon sights' bonus range are always at minimum value
UI_trait_moredesc_maluscanberemovedbywea: The maluses can be canceled by wearing glasses
UI_trait_moredesc_soundeffectsmuffled: Some sound effects will be muffled.
UI_trait_moredesc_zombiesbehindvisiblela: Zombies approaching from behind will be visible later
UI_trait_moredesc_canthearsound: Can't hear sound. Radio chatter doesn't appear.
UI_trait_moredesc_stillabletowatchtv: Still able to watch TV due to closed captions.
UI_trait_moredesc_zombiesbehindvisibleea: Zombies approaching from behind will be visible much earlier
UI_trait_moredesc_maxrangemodifieronweap: %1% max range modifier on weapon sights
UI_trait_moredesc_chanceofnotbeinginjure: %1% chance of not being injured by zombies
UI_trait_moredesc_chanceofgettingscratch: %1% chance of getting scratched/cut by trees
UI_trait_moredesc_unfitlosecondition: Can become Out of Shape by training Fitness to level %1
UI_trait_moredesc_unfitgaincondition: Gained if Fitness is below level %1
UI_trait_moredesc_outofshapeloseconditio: Can be lost by training Fitness to level %1
Replaced by Unfit if Fitness goes below level %1

UI_trait_moredesc_highercalorythresholdt: Higher calory threshold to gain weight , if current weight %1kg
UI_trait_moredesc_chancetotripwhilerunva: %1% chance to trip while run/sprint vaulting a low fence
UI_trait_moredesc_chancetotripfromlunge: %1% chance to trip from getting attacked by lunging zombies
UI_trait_moredesc_decreasedchancetotripf: Decreased chance to trip from getting attacked by lunging zombies
UI_trait_moredesc_increasedchancetofaila: Increased chance to fail a tall fence or wall climb
UI_trait_moredesc_doubledendurancelosswh: Doubled endurance loss when walking with heavy weight or running, sprinting, dragging corpses
UI_trait_moredesc_falldamage: %1% fall damage. and slightly increased chance of fracture/deep wound from falling
UI_trait_moredesc_cannotgainfitnessxptow: Cannot gain Fitness XP towards level %1
UI_trait_moredesc_replacedbyobeseifweigh: Replaced by Obese if weight goes above %1
UI_trait_moredesc_includingnonpackagedan: Including non-packaged food and cooked food.
UI_trait_moredesc_replacedbyveryunderwei: Replaced by Very Low Weight if weight goes below %1
UI_trait_moredesc_greatlyincreasedchance: Greatly increased chance to fail a tall fence climb
UI_trait_moredesc_cannotgainxptowardsfit: Cannot gain Fitness XP towards levels 7 and higher
UI_trait_moredesc_characterwillstartlosi: Character will start losing life if weight is below %1
UI_trait_moredesc_replacedbyemaciatedifw: Replaced by Emaciated if weight goes below %1

UI_trait_moredesc_replacedbyveruunderwei: Replaced by Very Low Weight if weight goes above %1

UI_trait_moredesc_replacedbystrongatleve: Replaced by Strong when reaching level %1 Strength
UI_trait_moredesc_replacedbyfeebleatleve: Replaced by Feeble when reaching level %1 Strength
UI_trait_moredesc_canbelostbytrainingstr: Can be lost by training Stength to level %1
UI_trait_moredesc_claustrophobic: Doesn't get panicked in rooms of %1+ tiles. The smaller the room, the faster the panic increase.
UI_trait_moredesc_windpenaltywhenaimingw: %1% wind penalty when aiming with guns
UI_trait_moredesc_doesnotwakeupwhenreach: But does not affect sleep time, so the character will stay asleep after reaching 0 tiredness
UI_trait_moredesc_needtosetanalarmtotake: Set an alarm every night to take full advantage of the trait
UI_trait_moredesc_greatlydecreasedchance: Greatly decreased chance of getting scratched/lacerated while walking or running through trees
UI_trait_moredesc_allwoundshealmuchfaste: All other wounds heal much faster
UI_trait_moredesc_allwoundshealmuchslowe: All other wounds heal much slower
UI_trait_moredesc_xpforallskillsexcept: %1% xp for all skills, except Fitness and Strength
UI_trait_moredesc_stillcantgoabovemovesp: (Still can't go above the move speed cap)
UI_trait_moredesc_ifusingthenewstealthsy: If using the new stealth system :
UI_trait_moredesc_ifusingtheoldstealthsy: If using the old stealth system :

UI_trait_moredesc_increasedminimumanbian: Slightly increased minimum ambient light, except in closed rooms
UI_trait_moredesc_reducedvisoinconemalus: Reduced vision cone malus in the darkness
UI_trait_moredesc_decreasedchanceoffaili: Decreased chance to fail climbing a tall fence or wall
UI_trait_moredesc_aftercraftingdoesntret: After crafting, doesn't return the used items to their original container
UI_trait_moredesc_includingtextonmapsand: Including text on maps or calory values on packaged food
UI_trait_moredesc_xpforweaponskillsandai: %1% XP for all weapon skills and Aiming skill
UI_trait_moredesc_decreasedchancewoundwh: Decreased chance of inury when opening a can without a can opener
UI_trait_moredesc_increasedchancewoundwh: Increased chance of inury when opening a can without a can opener
UI_trait_moredesc_raweggsnevercausefoodi: Raw eggs never cause food illness
UI_trait_moredesc_inventorytransferblood: Inventory transfer of bloody items is faster and causes stress
UI_trait_moredesc_endurancelosswhenrunni: %1% endurance loss when running , sprinting , carrying heavy load, or dragging corpses
UI_prof_moredesc_startingregularityexerc: Starts with %1 % regularity in all fitness & strength exercises
UI_trait_ThinSkinnedDesc: Increased chance of scratches, lacerations, or bites breaking the skin.
UI_ShortSighted_Condition: The malus can be canceled by wearing glasses
UI_moredesc_options_Tooltip_ShowMoreDesc: If not checked , no extra description will be added after the vanilla description
UI_moredesc_options_Tooltip_ShowForaging: If checked, will add foraging stats to the traits and professions descriptions
UI_moredesc_options_Tooltip_ShowFreeReci: If checked, will add foraging free recipes to the traits and professions descriptions
UI_InjuryIndicator_EnableInjureNotify_To:
Enables pop-up text when injured.
This is the main purpose of the mod.
UI_InjuryIndicator_SpeechSwitch_Tooltip:
Switch for using speech text.
Instead of 'skill up' text.
UI_trait_musicloverdesc: Feels better and more motivated with music
UI_TCMod_Options_Desc: Let the music be with you... always.
UI_Allow_KeyBinds_Ask: LEFT arrow key - Removes the cassette from the cassette player. UP arrow key - Toggles the cassette player ON/OFF. RIGHT arrow key - Toggles cassette player PLAY/STOP. Press the DOWN arrow key to insert a random cassette into the device.
UI_Allow_KeyBinds_Ask_tooltip:
Allow Device keys
You can use the keys for Walkmans and car radios.
UI_options_TCTogglePlayMedia_keyBind_too:
Starts cassette playback.
If the cassette player doesn't have a cassette, it will automatically insert one.
Only if you have one or more cassettes.
UI_options_TCRemoveMedia_keyBind_tooltip: Removes the cassette from the cassette player.
UI_options_TCAddRandomMedia_keyBind_tool:
Adds a random cassette.
Only if you have one or more cassettes.
UI_AutoGlobeBox_Ask_tooltip: The glove compartment will be used when adding or removing cassettes, rather than the equipment or inventory.
UI_AutoEquipment_Ask_tooltip: Backpacks and fanny packs will be used when adding and removing cassettes, rather than the inventory.
UI_TakeFrom_Ask_tooltip: *Caution* The location from which you want to send the cassettes. If the specified location is not found, nothing will happen.
UI_SendWhere_Ask_tooltip: Select your choice for leaving cassettes. If the specified place is not found they will be sent to inventory.
UI_TCMod_Options_Desc2:
The following options are for testing.
They work only if sandbox options are inactive.
UI_Walkmans_Ask_tooltip: Allows you to start with your favorite portable player.
UI_Audifonos_tooltip: Allows you to start with headphones or earbuds too.
UI_Boombox_tooltip: Allows you to start with a boombox.
UI_Vinylplayer_tooltip: Allows you to start with a vinyl player.
UI_helpPanelText:
Map Mod Manager is a tool for identifying cell conflicts between map mods.\
\
UI_acceptButtonTooltip: Save changes made to mods and go back to the main menu.
UI_backButtonTooltip: Discard changes made to mods and go back to the main menu.
UI_SelectAllSubscribedTooltip: Select/deselect all subscribed map mods to show their locations on the cell grid.
UI_SelectAllActiveTooltip: Select/deselect all active map mods to show their locations on the cell grid.
UI_ExportSelectedTooltip: Export selected maps (from both subscribed and all map mods), file is located in: c:\users\user\zomboid\lua\path
UI_ToggleAllSubscribedTooltip: Toggle the on/off status of all subscribed map mods.
UI_ToggleAllSelectedTooltip: Toggle the on/off status of all selected map mods that you are subscribed to. Maps selected from the all map mods list won't be toggled on, you need to subscribe to them first.
UI_ModLoadOrderTooltip: Adjust the load order of active map mods and dependencies.
UI_MoveToTopTooltip: Move selected map to the top of the mod load order.
UI_MoveUpTooltip: Move selected map up in the mod load order.
UI_MoveDownTooltip: Move selected map down in the mod load order.
UI_SelectAllMapsTooltip: Select all maps available in the database.
UI_QuickSelectTooltip: Select maps that don't conflict with your selected maps.
UI_FindMapsTooltip: Find maps that don't conflict with your selected maps.
UI_FilterMapsTooltip: Filter the list of maps based on the cells selected from the dropdown.
UI_MLacceptButtonTooltip: Save changes made to the load order and go back to Map Mod Manager.
UI_MLbackButtonTooltip: Discard changes made to the load order and go back to Map Mod Manager.
UI_RequiredByNotSubscribed: Required by selected and not subscribed:
UI_AutomaticRefueling_Started: Now that we're refueling, let's check on those zeds
UI_AutomaticRefueling_Stopped_MissingObj: Auto-refuel stopped because server object is missing (technical error)
UI_AutomaticRefueling_Stopped_MovedAway: Auto-refuel stopped because vehicle moved too far away
UI_AutomaticRefueling_Stopped_OutOfMoney: Auto-refuel stopped because you're out of money
UI_AutomaticRefueling_RepairTooltip: You need scissors, duct tape and 2 rubber hoses to repair the fuel pump.
UI_AutomaticRefueling_PermanentDamageToo: The pump is damaged and repairing pumps is not allowed.
UI_trait_VanSurvivorDesc: Start out with a stocked vehicle of survival gear, you grabbed everything you could before leaving!
UI_trait_RVOwnerDesc: Turns out you already own an RV and you're using it to get away!
UI_trait_BikeOwnerDesc: Start out with your own bicycle!
